task.label: notify the CSIRT or the competent authority

conditions.condition: an incident has caused or is capable of causing severe operational disruption of the services or financial loss for the entity concerned
an incident has affected or is capable of affecting other natural or legal persons by causing considerable material or non-material damage

task.label: notify the recipients of their services

conditions.condition: an incident has caused or is capable of causing severe operational disruption of the services or financial loss for the entity concerned
an incident has affected or is capable of affecting other natural or legal persons by causing considerable material or non-material damage
the significant incident is likely to adversely affect the provision of those services

task.label: report any information
receive information from essential and important entity
determine any cross-border impact of the incident
forward the notification to the CSIRT

conditions.condition: where the entities concerned notify the competent authority of a significant incident under the first subparagraph of paragraph 1

task.label: provide relevant information to Single Point of Contact

conditions.condition: in the case of a cross-border or cross-sectoral significant incident

task.label: communicate to the recipients any measures or remedies to take in response to that threat

conditions.condition: where applicable

task.label: submit to the CSIRT or the competent authority an early warning

conditions.condition: without undue delay and in any event within 24 hours of becoming aware of the significant incident

task.label: submit to the CSIRT or the competent authority an incident notification

conditions.condition: without undue delay and in any event within 72 hours of becoming aware of the significant incident

task.label: request an intermediate report on relevant status updates
submit an intermediate report on relevant status updates

conditions.condition: upon the request of a CSIRT or the competent authority

task.label: submit to the CSIRT or the competent authority a final report

conditions.condition: not later than one month after the submission of the incident notification

exception.description: In the event of an ongoing incident at the time of the submission of the final report, entities shall provide a progress report at that time and a final report within one month of their handling of the incident

task.label: provide a progress report at the time of submission of the final report

conditions.condition: in the event of an ongoing incident at the time of the submission of the final report

exception.description: Where the incident is still ongoing at the time of the final report, a progress report replaces the final report at that stage, with the final report due within one month of handling

task.label: notify the CSIRT or the competent authority

conditions.condition: with regard to significant incidents that have an impact on the provision of its trust services
without undue delay and in any event within 24 hours of becoming aware of the significant incident

exception.description: By way of derogation from paragraph 4, first subparagraph, point (b), trust service providers are subject to a 24-hour notification deadline instead of 72 hours

task.label: provide a response to the notifying entity including initial feedback on the significant incident

conditions.condition: without undue delay and where possible within 24 hours of receiving the early warning

task.label: request guidance or operational advice on the implementation of possible mitigation measures
provide guidance or operational advice

conditions.condition: upon request of the notifying entity

exception.description: Where the CSIRT is not the initial recipient of the notification, the guidance shall be provided by the competent authority in cooperation with the CSIRT

task.label: cooperate with the CSIRT on guidance

conditions.condition: where the CSIRT is not the initial recipient of the notification
upon request of the notifying entity

task.label: request additional technical support
provide additional technical support

conditions.condition: if the entity concerned so requests

task.label: provide guidance on reporting the significant incident to law enforcement authorities

conditions.condition: where the significant incident is suspected to be of criminal nature

task.label: receive relevant information

conditions.condition: in the case of a cross-border or cross-sectoral significant incident

task.label: inform the other affected Member States and ENISA of the significant incident

conditions.condition: where appropriate
in particular where the significant incident concerns two or more Member States

task.label: preserve the entity's security and commercial interests as well as the confidentiality of the information provided

conditions.condition: when informing other affected Member States and ENISA

task.label: consult the entity

conditions.condition: where public awareness is necessary to prevent a significant incident or to deal with an ongoing significant incident, or where disclosure of the significant incident is otherwise in the public interest
where appropriate, in the case of CSIRTs or competent authorities of other Member States concerned

task.label: inform the public about the significant incident

conditions.condition: where public awareness is necessary to prevent a significant incident or to deal with an ongoing significant incident, or where disclosure of the significant incident is otherwise in the public interest
after consulting the entity concerned
where appropriate, in the case of CSIRTs or competent authorities of other Member States concerned

task.label: require the entity to inform the public about the significant incident

conditions.condition: where public awareness is necessary to prevent a significant incident or to deal with an ongoing significant incident, or where disclosure of the significant incident is otherwise in the public interest
after consulting the entity concerned
where appropriate, in the case of CSIRTs or competent authorities of other Member States concerned

task.label: inform the public about the significant incident

conditions.condition: where public awareness is necessary to prevent a significant incident or to deal with an ongoing significant incident, or where disclosure of the significant incident is otherwise in the public interest
after consulting the entity concerned
upon request
where appropriate, in the case of CSIRTs or competent authorities of other Member States concerned

task.label: request to forward notifications to the single points of contact of other affected Member States
forward notifications to the single points of contact of other affected Member States

conditions.condition: at the request of the CSIRT or the competent authority

task.label: submit to ENISA a summary report

conditions.condition: every three months

task.label: adopt technical guidance on the parameters of the information to be included in the summary report

conditions.condition: in order to contribute to the provision of comparable information

task.label: inform the Cooperation Group and the CSIRTs network about its findings

conditions.condition: findings on notifications received every six months

task.label: provide to the competent authorities information about significant incidents, incidents, cyber threats and near misses
adopt implementing acts further specifying the type of information, the format and the procedure of a notification and of a communication
adopt implementing acts further specifying the cases in which an incident shall be considered to be significant

conditions.condition: by 17 October 2024

task.label: adopt implementing acts further specifying the cases in which an incident shall be considered to be significant

conditions.condition: with regard to essential and important entities

task.label: exchange advice and cooperate with the Cooperation Group on the draft implementing acts
exchange advice and cooperate with the Commission on the draft implementing acts
adopt implementing acts in accordance with the examination procedure referred to in Article 39(2)

conditions.condition: when adopting implementing acts under paragraph 11
